free_text: Total neutron cross-section measurement for Cf-250
Two samples obtained by irradiation in the SM-2
-- First sample - total Cf mass is 412 +- 3 microgram
-- Second sample - total Cf mass 1033 +- 70 microgram
Flight base is 91.7 m, resolution 110 nsec/m ,
Errors are not specified, probably total
